concepts.title: RMS, Average and MP Velocities
concepts.conceptBody:
RMS, Average and MP Velocities

$\begin{array}{l} {} & \text{m}=\text{ mass }\text{ of }\text{ each }\text{ molecule }\text{ {M}'}=\text{ mass }\text{ of }\text{ gas } \\ {} & \text{N}=\text{ no}\text{. }\text{ of }\text{ molecules }\text{ V}=\text{ volume }\text{ of }\text{ gas } \\ {} & \therefore {{\text{v}}_{\text{rms}}}=\sqrt{\left( \frac{3\text{P}}{\rho } \right)}=\sqrt{\frac{3\text{RT}}{\text{M}\left( \text{ in }\text{ kg } \right)}}=\sqrt{\frac{3\text{KT}}{\text{m}}} \\ \end{array}$

where $\text{K}=\left( \frac{\text{R}}{{{\text{N}}_{\text{A}}}} \right)\equiv$ Boltzmann constant $=\left( \begin{array}{*{35}{l}} 1.38 & {{10}^{-23}}\text{ J}/\text{K} \\ \end{array} \right)$

${{\text{v}}_{\text{avg}}}=\left( \frac{{{\text{v}}_{1}}+{{\text{v}}_{2}}+\ldots {{\text{v}}_{\text{n}}}}{\text{N}} \right)=\sqrt{\frac{8\text{RT}}{\pi \text{M}}}=\sqrt{\frac{8\text{P}}{\pi \rho }}=\sqrt{\frac{8\text{KT}}{\pi \text{m}}}$

${{\text{v}}_{\text{mp}}}=\sqrt{\frac{2\text{RT}}{\text{M}}}=\sqrt{\frac{2\text{P}}{\rho }}=\sqrt{\left( \frac{2\text{KT}}{\text{m}} \right)}$

${{\text{v}}_{\text{rms}}}>{{\text{v}}_{\text{avg}}}>{{\text{v}}_{\text{mp}}}$
